author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: Chore: Generate UMD build with Rollup (algolia/react-instantsearch#603)
body:
* chore: add Rollup dependencies

* chore: add Rollup configuration

* refactor(build): use Rollup instead of Webpack

* chore: remove the hard dependency on UglifyJS

* chore: remove useless Webpack config

* chore: reorder package.json

* chore: add rollup plugin node globals

* chore: rollup add globas for process.env

* docs(rollup): update

* docs(rollup): remove bitly link
